summary: Markets show resilience with Bitcoin rebounding to $81k amid geopolitical tensions in the Persian Gulf driving oil volatility, Wall Street futures gaining, and RBA rate hike supporting AUD. Commodities like Brent and WTI pull back slightly after spikes, while forex pairs exhibit range-bound trading with mild USD strength. Key data releases including US JOLTS and ISM Services are anticipated to influence sentiment.

signals.reason: Multiple videos indicate bullish bias with target of $82K-$85K, but warns of trap setups and potential 10% dump before continuation
